name: Celeste Maloy
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $165,181 for Celeste Maloy in U.S. House, UT-02. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
